examples: In addition, the Backspace or Delete keys will reverse the default.
Now press Ctrl + Backspace to fill the selection with your pre-set Background Color.
The highlight will go the moment we enter a backspace and the line length reduces to 79 from 80.
The space key is to the right side of these four squares, and the backspace key is to the left.
Positioned conveniently above backspace, it granted us immediate access to multi-directional text eradication -- but its close proximity caused more than a few mistakes.
